prayer:
Approach the servitor with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Purity to awaken its Machine Spirit.
Anoint the servitor's cranial implants and servohydraulics with blessed ablative oils.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath upon corruptive xenos taint, enacting the sacred purification rites.
Scour the servitor's data-vaults with electro-incantations until the Machine Spirit sings clear once more.
Seal the purification with the Sigil of Sanctity upon its chassis.

prayer:
Kneel before the Predator tank's auspex arrays, beseeching the Omnissiah for reset of its war-spirits.
Disconnect the predator tank's plasma core linkages whilst chanting the Litany of Reboot.
Purge residual battle-data from the predator tank's cogitators with sanctified data-wipes.
Reinitialize the Machine Spirit through sequential invocation of activation runes.
Verify the reset by querying the predator tank's vox-grilles for the Machine God's affirmation.

Initiate engagement protocols, beseeching the Omnissiah to guide the Manticore's shells true.
Confirm the Machine Spirit's wrath through auspex feedback and thunderous reload cycles.
